---
title: "working with spatial data in R"
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(leaflet)
library(scales)
library(ggspatial)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
# read in shapefile using read_sf()
ak_rgns_sf <- read_sf(here("data/shapefile_demo_data/ak_regions_simp.shp"))
```
